get.description:
Get identity provider (IdP) by ID

 Returns an identity provider (social/enterprise login) by its ID, which can be of the type Google, AzureAD, etc.

clientId.title: client_id
clientId.description: Client id (App ID or Service ID) provided by Apple.

keyId.title: key_id
keyId.description: ID of the private key generated by Apple.

scopes.title: scopes
scopes.description: The scopes requested by Zitadel during the request to Apple.

clientId.title: client_id
clientId.description: Client id of the Azure AD application

tenant.title: tenant
tenant.description:
Defines what user accounts should be able to login (Personal,
 Organizational, All).

emailVerified.title: email_verified
emailVerified.description:
Azure AD doesn't send if the email has been verified. Enable this if the
 user email should always be added verified in Zitadel (no verification
 emails will be sent).

scopes.title: scopes
scopes.description: The scopes requested by Zitadel during the request to Azure AD.

issuer.title: issuer
issuer.description: The OIDC issuer of the identity provider.

clientId.title: client_id
clientId.description: Client id generated by the identity provider.

scopes.title: scopes
scopes.description:
The scopes requested by Zitadel during the request on the identity
 provider.

isIdTokenMapping.title: is_id_token_mapping
isIdTokenMapping.description:
If true, provider information get mapped from the id token, not from the
 userinfo endpoint.

clientId.title: client_id
clientId.description: The client ID of the GitHub App.

scopes.title: scopes
scopes.description: The scopes requested by Zitadel during the request to GitHub.

clientId.title: client_id
clientId.description: The client ID of the GitHub App.

scopes.title: scopes
scopes.description: The scopes requested by Zitadel during the request to GitHub.

clientId.title: client_id
clientId.description: Client id of the GitLab application.

scopes.title: scopes
scopes.description: The scopes requested by Zitadel during the request to GitLab.

clientId.title: client_id
clientId.description: Client id of the GitLab application.

scopes.title: scopes
scopes.description: The scopes requested by Zitadel during the request to GitLab.

clientId.title: client_id
clientId.description: Client id of the Google application.

scopes.title: scopes
scopes.description: The scopes requested by Zitadel during the request to Google.

id.title: id
id.description: Unique identifier for the identity provider.

state.title: state
state.description: Current state of the identity provider.

type.title: type
type.description: Type of the identity provider, for example OIDC, JWT, LDAP and SAML.

config.title: config
config.description: Configuration for the type of the identity provider.

jwtEndpoint.title: jwt_endpoint
jwtEndpoint.description: The endpoint where the JWT can be extracted.

issuer.title: issuer
issuer.description: The issuer of the JWT (for validation).

keysEndpoint.title: keys_endpoint
keysEndpoint.description: The endpoint to the key (JWK) which is used to sign the JWT with.

headerName.title: header_name
headerName.description: The name of the header where the JWT is sent in, default is authorization.

clientId.title: client_id
clientId.description: Client id generated by the identity provider.

authorizationEndpoint.title: authorization_endpoint
authorizationEndpoint.description: The endpoint where Zitadel send the user to authenticate.

tokenEndpoint.title: token_endpoint
tokenEndpoint.description: The endpoint where Zitadel can get the token.

userEndpoint.title: user_endpoint
userEndpoint.description: The endpoint where Zitadel can get the user information.

scopes.title: scopes
scopes.description:
The scopes requested by Zitadel during the request on the identity
 provider.

idAttribute.title: id_attribute
idAttribute.description:
Defines how the attribute is called where Zitadel can get the id of the
 user.

isLinkingAllowed.title: is_linking_allowed
isLinkingAllowed.description:
Enable if users should be able to link an existing Zitadel user with an
 external account.

isCreationAllowed.title: is_creation_allowed
isCreationAllowed.description:
Enable if users should be able to create a new account in Zitadel when
 using an external account.

isAutoCreation.title: is_auto_creation
isAutoCreation.description:
Enable if a new account in Zitadel should be created automatically when
 login with an external account.

isAutoUpdate.title: is_auto_update
isAutoUpdate.description:
Enable if a the Zitadel account fields should be updated automatically on
 each login.

autoLinking.title: auto_linking
autoLinking.description:
Enable if users should get prompted to link an existing Zitadel user to an
 external account if the selected attribute matches.

metadataXml.title: metadata_xml
metadataXml.description: Metadata of the SAML identity provider.

binding.title: binding
binding.description: Binding which defines the type of communication with the identity provider.

withSignedRequest.title: with_signed_request
withSignedRequest.description: Boolean which defines if the authentication requests are signed.

transientMappingAttributeName.title: transient_mapping_attribute_name
transientMappingAttributeName.description:
Optional name of the attribute, which will be used to map the user
 in case the nameid-format returned is
 `urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:nameid-format:transient`.

federatedLogoutEnabled.title: federated_logout_enabled
federatedLogoutEnabled.description:
Boolean weather federated logout is enabled. If enabled, Zitadel will send a logout request to the identity provider,
 if the user terminates the session in ZITADEL. Be sure to provide a SLO endpoint as part of the metadata.

signatureAlgorithm.title: signature_algorithm
signatureAlgorithm.description:
Specify a Signature Algorithm that should used to sign SAML requests and responses.
 Can be set only if `with_signed_request` is set.

sequence.title: sequence
sequence.description:
sequence represents the order of events. It's always counting

 on read: the sequence of the last event reduced by the projection

 on manipulation: the timestamp of the event(s) added by the manipulation

changeDate.title: change_date
changeDate.description:
change_date is the timestamp when the object was changed

 on read: the timestamp of the last event reduced by the projection

 on manipulation: the timestamp of the event(s) added by the manipulation

resourceOwner.title: resource_owner
resourceOwner.description: resource_owner is the organization or instance_id an object belongs to

creationDate.title: creation_date
creationDate.description: creation_date is the timestamp where the first operation on the object was made

connect-protocol-version.title: Connect-Protocol-Version
connect-protocol-version.description: Define the version of the Connect protocol

code.description: The status code, which should be an enum value of [google.rpc.Code][google.rpc.Code].

message.description: A developer-facing error message, which should be in English. Any user-facing error message should be localized and sent in the [google.rpc.Status.details][google.rpc.Status.details] field, or localized by the client.

google.protobuf.Any.description: Contains an arbitrary serialized message along with a @type that describes the type of the serialized message.
